# Swirski UI Full LLM Context

Swirski UI is a React component package for bold, graphic, studio-flavored interfaces. It combines thick borders, hard shadows, expressive typography, custom cursors, practical app primitives, theme tokens, docs, playgrounds, generated props tables, examples, and registry workflows.

Current package version: `@swirski/ui@1.2.5`.

Docs site: https://ui.swirski.dev

## What Swirski UI Is

Swirski UI is intended to sit somewhere between shadcn/ui and Mantine:

- Use `@swirski/ui` when an app wants a normal package install and package updates.
- Use `@swirski/cli` when an app wants Swirski source copied into its own component folders.
- Use the hosted shadcn-compatible registry when an app already uses shadcn workflows and wants direct registry item URLs.
- Use `SwirskiProvider` when the app wants Swirski CSS tokens for color, fonts, borders, shadows, and color scheme.

The visual language is loud but practical: strong borders, hard offset shadows, graphic color, uppercase labels, expressive display fonts, dense app primitives, and `className` escape hatches.

## Build a Swirski Component

Detailed guide: https://ui.swirski.dev/build-component

Starter template: https://ui.swirski.dev/templates/component/README.md

When adding a component, treat it as a package feature, docs feature, and registry feature at the same time:

- Start with `pnpm create:component <component-name>` when possible.
- Use the component template files when you want to inspect or copy the scaffold by hand.
- Pick a lowercase registry slug and PascalCase export.
- Design the API around `variant`, `size`, `tone`, `className`, forwarded refs, and native props.
- Use `cn`, `swirskiAttrs`, and `Slot` when polymorphic composition is useful.
- Add `packages/ui/src/components/<slug>/<Name>.tsx` and `packages/ui/src/components/<slug>/index.ts`.
- Export it from `packages/ui/src/index.ts`.
- Add docs metadata in `apps/docs/content/components.tsx`.
- Add playground metadata in `apps/docs/content/playgrounds.tsx` when the component has meaningful variants.
- Add the registry manifest entry in `registry/swirski.registry.json`.
- Add tests for accessibility, keyboard behavior, focus, disabled state, and controlled/uncontrolled behavior when relevant.
- Run `pnpm docs:metadata`, `pnpm test:ui`, `pnpm build:ui`, `pnpm registry:shadcn`, and `pnpm build`.

## Install Workflows

### Package

Install:

```bash
pnpm add @swirski/ui
```

Import styles once in the app entry:

```tsx
import "@swirski/ui/styles.css";
```

Import components:

```tsx
import { Button, Card, CardContent, Text, Title } from "@swirski/ui";
```

Tailwind CSS v4 package consumers should make Tailwind scan the package output:

```css
@source "../node_modules/@swirski/ui/dist";
```

Use package imports when the app wants updates through npm.

### Swirski CLI

Install:

```bash
pnpm add -D @swirski/cli
```

Initialize and add items:

```bash
pnpm exec swirski init
pnpm exec swirski list
pnpm exec swirski add button
pnpm exec swirski add button card dialog
pnpm exec swirski add use-disclosure use-clipboard
pnpm exec swirski add --all
```

The CLI reads `registry/swirski.registry.json` and copies source from `packages/ui/src/components/*` or `packages/ui/src/hooks/*` into the configured app path. Storybook files are intentionally skipped by the local CLI.

Default generated config:

```json
{
  "componentsPath": "src/components/ui",
  "stylePath": "src/styles.css"
}
```

Use the CLI when the app wants source ownership.

### shadcn Registry

View or add hosted registry items:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest view https://ui.swirski.dev/r/button.json
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://ui.swirski.dev/r/button.json
```

Configure a namespace in `components.json`:

```json
{
  "registries": {
    "@swirski": "https://ui.swirski.dev/r/{name}.json"
  }
}
```

Then install by namespace:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @swirski/button @swirski/dialog
```

Registry root:

```txt
https://ui.swirski.dev/registry.json
```

Registry item URL pattern:

```txt
https://ui.swirski.dev/r/{name}.json
```

Shared base item:

```txt
https://ui.swirski.dev/r/swirski-base.json
```

The hosted shadcn output preserves the package source tree under `@ui/swirski/...` so relative imports such as `../../system` continue to resolve after install.

## Theme Provider

Wrap the app in `SwirskiProvider` to set CSS tokens:

```tsx
import { SwirskiProvider, createSwirskiTheme } from "@swirski/ui";

const theme = createSwirskiTheme({
  colorBlue: "#0047FF",
  colorYellow: "#FFE45C",
  shadowMd: "8px 8px 0 var(--sw-color-shadow)",
});

export function App() {
  return (
    <SwirskiProvider theme={theme}>
      <YourRoutes />
    </SwirskiProvider>
  );
}
```

Dark mode:

```tsx
<SwirskiProvider colorScheme="dark">
  <App />
</SwirskiProvider>
```

Core tokens:

```txt
--sw-color-ink
--sw-color-paper
--sw-color-surface
--sw-color-muted
--sw-color-blue
--sw-color-yellow
--sw-color-red
--sw-color-shadow
--sw-color-focus
--sw-border-width
--sw-shadow-sm
--sw-shadow-md
--sw-shadow-lg
--sw-font-body
--sw-font-heading
--sw-font-display
```

## Component Catalogue

### Foundations

- `SwirskiProvider`: Theme provider and token helpers. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/swirski-provider
- `Title`: Heading primitive exported through Typography. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/typography
- `Text`: Text primitive exported through Typography. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/typography
- `Container`: Centered page width helper. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/container
- `Grid`: Reusable CSS grid layout primitive. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/grid
- `Separator`: Visual divider. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/separator
- `SectionLabel`: Tilted section label. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/section-label

### Actions and Feedback

- `Button`: Bold action primitive. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/button. Registry: https://ui.swirski.dev/r/button.json
- `Badge`: Compact status label. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/badge
- `Alert`, `AlertTitle`, `AlertDescription`: Composable callout block. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/alert
- `Toast`, `ToastProvider`, `useToast`: Status messages for save states, confirmations, and errors. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/toast
- `Progress`: Simple progress meter. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/progress
- `Loader`: Compact loading spinner. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/loader
- `Skeleton`: Placeholder block for loading layouts. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/skeleton

### Forms

- `Field`, `Label`, `Input`, `Textarea`, `FieldHint`, `FieldError`: Field, label, input, and textarea primitives. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/field
- `Select`: Custom dropdown picker. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/select. Registry: https://ui.swirski.dev/r/select.json
- `Checkbox`: Native checkbox with Swirski mark. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/checkbox
- `Switch`: Native switch control. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/switch
- `RadioGroup`: Native radio group for choosing one option from a set. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/radio-group
- `Slider`: Native range input for numeric controls. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/slider

### Overlays and Interaction

- `Dialog`, `DialogTrigger`, `DialogContent`, `DialogTitle`, `DialogDescription`, `DialogClose`: Modal overlay primitive. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/dialog. Registry: https://ui.swirski.dev/r/dialog.json
- `Drawer`: Side sheet primitive. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/drawer
- `Popover`, `PopoverTrigger`, `PopoverContent`: Floating content panel. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/popover
- `DropdownMenu`, `DropdownMenuTrigger`, `DropdownMenuContent`, `DropdownMenuItem`: Compact action menu. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/dropdown-menu
- `Tooltip`: Hover and focus label. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/tooltip
- `Tabs`, `TabsList`, `TabsTrigger`, `TabsContent`: Tabbed section primitive. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/tabs
- `Accordion`, `AccordionItem`, `AccordionTrigger`, `AccordionContent`: Native disclosure stack. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/accordion
- `CursorProvider`, `CursorDock`, `CursorPicker`: Custom cursor provider and picker. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/cursor

### Layout, Navigation, and Data

- `Card`, `CardContent`, `CardMedia`, `CardTitle`, `CardMeta`, `CardBadge`: Framed content block. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/card
- `Avatar`: Framed user image or fallback. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/avatar
- `Navbar`: Header and mobile navigation primitives. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/navbar
- `Breadcrumb`: Navigation trail primitives. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/breadcrumb
- `Pagination`: Page controls for tables, lists, and archives. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/pagination
- `Table`, `TableHead`, `TableBody`, `TableRow`, `TableHeader`, `TableCell`: Base data table. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/table

### Visual Texture and Media

- `DotGrid`: Dot grid background primitive. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/dot-grid
- `LineGrid`: Line grid background primitive. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/line-grid
- `DiagonalLines`: Diagonal stripe background primitive. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/diagonal-lines
- `ImageFrame`: Framed image surface. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/components/image-frame

## Hooks

- `useDisclosure`: Open, close, and toggle boolean disclosure state. It depends on `useControllableState` in copy workflows. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-disclosure
- `useControllableState`: Build controlled or uncontrolled component state. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-controllable-state
- `useClickOutside`: Run a callback when pointer events happen outside an element. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-click-outside
- `useEscapeKey`: Run a callback when Escape is pressed. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-escape-key
- `useLocalStorage`: Persist React state in localStorage with serializer hooks. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-local-storage
- `useMediaQuery`: Track a CSS media query in React state. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-media-query
- `useReducedMotion`: Read the user preference for reduced motion. It depends on `useMediaQuery` in copy workflows. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-reduced-motion
- `useClipboard`: Copy text to the clipboard and track copied/error state. Docs: https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-clipboard

## Import Guidance for Code Generation

When generating package-based examples, import from `@swirski/ui`:

```tsx
import {
  Button,
  Card,
  CardContent,
  Container,
  Grid,
  Text,
  Title,
} from "@swirski/ui";
```

When generating copied-source examples for users of the Swirski CLI or shadcn registry, assume files are copied into the app and imports may need to use the user's configured aliases.

Use `className` for local layout and minor styling overrides. Use `SwirskiProvider` and CSS variables for broad theme changes.

Prefer native primitives where Swirski already uses them, such as native checkbox, switch, radio, slider, details-based accordion, and semantic table elements.

## Workspace Development

The repository is a pnpm workspace:

```txt
apps/docs        Documentation site
packages/ui      React component package
packages/cli     Local registry CLI
registry         Component registry manifest
```

Common commands:

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev
pnpm storybook
pnpm build:ui
pnpm build
pnpm registry:list
pnpm registry:shadcn
pnpm test:ui
```

Release command for `@swirski/ui`:

```bash
pnpm release:ui patch
pnpm release:ui minor
pnpm release:ui major
```

Dry-run package release:

```bash
pnpm release:ui patch --dry-run
```

## Current Quality Notes

Swirski UI has a broad component surface, docs pages, playgrounds, generated props metadata, examples, component tests for several interactive primitives, and hosted shadcn-compatible registry output.

Important near-term quality work:

- Validate hosted shadcn registry items in CI.
- Smoke test remote shadcn installs for key components.
- Add per-component install tabs for package, Swirski CLI, and shadcn workflows.
- Strengthen accessibility tests for Dialog, DropdownMenu, Popover, Tooltip, and Select.
- Add richer keyboard navigation for DropdownMenu.
- Consider a shared Floating UI positioning layer for floating components.
